message:
test: harden migration with edge case tests and atomic write fixes

Phase 1-4 of migration hardening:
- Add 33 edge case tests across run_migration, doltserver, and doctor packages
- Fix truncateOutput panic on maxLen < 4 (negative slice index)
- Fix non-atomic writes in saveMigrationCheckpoint, EnsureMetadata, and
  writeDoltMetadata — use util.AtomicWriteFile to prevent corruption on crash
- All migration-related tests pass, golangci-lint clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
